Screenshot redaction manual test page (issue #312)

How to use: serve or open this file, turn on Settings → Multimodal → Screenshot redaction in the extension, then run /screenshot (or ask the agent to take a screenshot / verify the page). Compare the returned image against the REDACT / SKIP tags below each element.

If opening via file://, enable "Allow access to file URLs" for the extension (chrome://extensions or about:addons), otherwise the content script won't inject and every field will incorrectly show as unredacted. Easier: serve the test/fixtures/ folder with python3 -m http.server and open it over http://localhost instead.

Form fields — should always be redacted (password)

REDACT

Form fields — redacted when "blur text inputs" is on (default)

REDACT
REDACT
REDACT
REDACT
REDACT
REDACT
REDACT
Editable rich text field
REDACT
REDACT

Form fields — should NOT be redacted (excluded types)

SKIP
SKIP
SKIP
SKIP
SKIP
SKIP (invisible anyway)

Page text — detected PII patterns

Standalone email as its own element: contact.person@example.org

REDACT

Standalone phone as its own element: (212) 555-0199

REDACT

Page text — heuristic should skip (known limitations, by design)

A bare 4-digit number that looks like a year: 2026

SKIP (looks like a year)

An email mentioned inside a normal sentence: "You can reach the team at support@example.com if the deploy fails before Friday." (too many words around it)

SKIP (embedded in prose, not its own element)

Known gap — canvas-drawn text (never redacted)

PII rendered as pixels on a <canvas> is invisible to DOM heuristics and will never be redacted by this feature — this is the sharpest limitation called out in the Settings warning and FAQ.

SKIP (cannot be fixed — canvas pixels, not DOM)

Known gap — srcdoc iframe (not covered by match_about_blank)

Chrome's match_about_blank content-script matcher does not cover srcdoc iframes (that needs match_origin_as_fallback), so the content script never injects here and this password field is expected to leak through unredacted.

SKIP (known gap — not fixed)

Working case — same-origin nested iframe

This iframe loads a real same-origin document; its fields should be correctly mapped into the parent screenshot's coordinate space and redacted (tests mergeRedactionFrameRegions).
